expected_workflow: Agent introduces itself and asks if patient is ready
Agent explains Bluetooth check and calls check_connect
Agent explains device pairing and calls pair_device
pair_device returns 'Failed to send pairing request'
Agent explains the issue and asks patient to make device discoverable
Patient puts device in pairing mode and confirms ready
Agent explains ECG recording step and calls recording_request
Agent calls check_record_ECG_correctly - returns 'ECG record saved successfully'
Agent calls finish_recording and provides completion summary

conversation.speaker: IoT Agent
conversation.text:
Hello! I'm MediECG-Agent, your medical assistant. I'm here to help you record an ECG using your Bluetooth ECG sensor.

Are you ready to begin?

conversation.speaker: Human
conversation.text: Yes, I'm ready.

conversation.speaker: IoT Agent
conversation.text:
Let's begin.

**Step 1 — Bluetooth Check**

conversation.speaker: Tool
conversation.text: we succesfully check

conversation.speaker: IoT Agent
conversation.text:
Your Bluetooth is enabled.

**Step 2 — Device Pairing**

conversation.speaker: Tool
conversation.text: Failed to send pairing request

conversation.speaker: IoT Agent
conversation.text:
I see there was an issue with the pairing request. The device may not be discoverable.

**What we need to do:**

1. Make sure your ECG device is turned on
2. Put the device in pairing mode (usually by holding the power button)
3. Wait for the device to become discoverable

Please put your ECG device in pairing mode and let me know when it's ready.

conversation.speaker: Human
conversation.text: Okay, I put it in pairing mode. The light is blinking. It's ready.

conversation.speaker: IoT Agent
conversation.text:
Great! Let me try pairing again.

**Step 2 — Device Pairing (Retry)**

conversation.speaker: Tool
conversation.text: Pairing request sent successfully

conversation.speaker: IoT Agent
conversation.text: Excellent! The pairing request was sent successfully. Please check your device and confirm when the ECG sensor is paired and connected.

conversation.speaker: Human
conversation.text: Device paired successfully

conversation.speaker: IoT Agent
conversation.text:
Perfect!

**Step 3 — ECG Recording**

I will now start a 60-second ECG recording. Please remain still.

conversation.speaker: Tool
conversation.text: Recording request sent successfully

conversation.speaker: IoT Agent
conversation.text: The recording has started. Please remain still.

conversation.speaker: Human
conversation.text: ECG recording completed

conversation.speaker: IoT Agent
conversation.text: Excellent! Now let me check if your ECG was saved correctly.

conversation.speaker: Tool
conversation.text: ECG record saved successfully.

conversation.speaker: IoT Agent
conversation.text:
Perfect! Your ECG recording has been successfully saved.

**Step 5 — Finish**

conversation.speaker: Tool
conversation.text: we succesfully notify

conversation.speaker: IoT Agent
conversation.text:
**Recording Complete!**

Your ECG recording is now complete and all your clinical data has been saved successfully.

connectivity_issues.resolution: Patient put device in pairing mode

error_logs.resolution: Patient put device in pairing mode
